advisor.enabled.description: Pair a second model (assigned to the 'advisor' role) that passively reviews each turn and injects notes.
advisor.enabled.label: Enable Advisor
advisor.immuneTurns.description: After an advisor concern or blocker interrupts, route further concerns/blockers non-interruptingly for this many primary turns.
advisor.immuneTurns.label: Advisor Immune Turns
advisor.subagents.description: Also enable the advisor on spawned task/eval subagents.
advisor.subagents.label: Advisor for Subagents
advisor.syncBacklog.description: Pause the main agent for up to 30 seconds if the advisor falls behind by this many turns. Off disables catch-up delays.
advisor.syncBacklog.label: Advisor Sync Backlog
ask.notify.description: Notify when the ask tool is waiting for input
ask.notify.label: Ask Notification
ask.timeout.description: Auto-select the recommended ask option after this many seconds (0 disables)
ask.timeout.label: Ask Timeout
astEdit.enabled.description: Enable the ast_edit tool for structural AST rewrites
astEdit.enabled.label: AST Edit
astGrep.enabled.description: Enable the ast_grep tool for structural AST search
astGrep.enabled.label: AST Grep
async.enabled.description: Enable async bash commands and background task execution
async.enabled.label: Async Execution
async.pollWaitDuration.description: How long the poll tool waits for background job updates before returning the current state. A fixed value waits that exact duration every time. `smart` adapts: it starts at 5s and lengthens with each back-to-back poll (up to 5m), then resets to 5s after about a minute without polling.
async.pollWaitDuration.label: Max Poll Time
autoResume.description: Automatically resume the most recent session in the current directory
autoResume.label: Auto Resume
autocompleteMaxVisible.description: Max visible items in autocomplete dropdown (3-20)
autocompleteMaxVisible.label: Autocomplete Items
autolearn.autoContinue.description: When on, auto-run one capture turn at stop (uses extra tokens). Off = passive reminder on your next turn.
autolearn.autoContinue.label: Auto-run capture at stop
autolearn.enabled.description: After the agent stops, nudge it to capture lessons to memory and create/enhance isolated managed skills
autolearn.enabled.label: Auto-Learn (experimental)
bash.autoBackground.enabled.description: Automatically background long-running bash commands and deliver the result later
bash.autoBackground.enabled.label: Bash Auto-Background
bash.enabled.description: Enable the bash tool for shell command execution
bash.enabled.label: Bash
bash.stripTrailingHeadTail.description: Silently drop trailing `| head`/`| tail` pipes from single-line bash commands. Output is already truncated automatically.
bash.stripTrailingHeadTail.label: Strip head/tail Pipes
bashInterceptor.enabled.description: Block shell commands that have dedicated tools
bashInterceptor.enabled.label: Bash Interceptor
branchSummary.enabled.description: Prompt to summarize when leaving a branch
branchSummary.enabled.label: Branch Summaries
browser.cmux.description: Use cmux WKWebView surfaces for browser automation when a cmux socket is available. Set PI_BROWSER_CMUX=0 or PI_BROWSER_CMUX=1 to override.
browser.cmux.label: cmux Browser
browser.enabled.description: Enable the browser tool for scripted Chromium automation (puppeteer)
browser.enabled.label: Browser
browser.headless.description: Launch browser in headless mode (disable to show browser UI)
browser.headless.label: Headless Browser
browser.screenshotDir.description: Directory to save screenshots. If unset, screenshots go to a temp file. Supports ~. Examples: ~/Downloads, ~/Desktop, /sdcard/Download (Android)
browser.screenshotDir.label: Screenshot Directory
checkpoint.enabled.description: Enable the checkpoint and rewind tools for context checkpointing
checkpoint.enabled.label: Checkpoint/Rewind
cloud.maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent Ollama Cloud subagent runs per process; 0 disables the provider-specific limit
cloud.maxConcurrency.label: Ollama Cloud Max Concurrency
codexResets.autoRedeem.description: When a turn is blocked by the Codex weekly limit on the active account and no other account is available, run the conservative saved-reset check. unset asks before spending the first eligible reset, yes spends eligible resets without prompting, and no disables the check entirely. Requires retries enabled.
codexResets.autoRedeem.label: Codex Auto-Redeem Saved Resets
codexResets.keepCredits.description: Never auto-spend below this many saved resets (0 = the last credit may be spent automatically).
codexResets.keepCredits.label: Codex Auto-Redeem Reserve
codexResets.minBlockedMinutes.descriptio: Only auto-redeem when the natural weekly reset is at least this many minutes away (don't spend a ~30-day credit to save a short wait).
codexResets.minBlockedMinutes.label: Codex Auto-Redeem Min Block
collab.displayName.description: Name shown to other collab participants (default: OS username)
collab.displayName.label: Display Name
collab.relayUrl.label: Relay URL
collab.webUrl.description: Browser UI used by /collab links; empty derives from collab.relayUrl; explicit http:// is localhost-only
collab.webUrl.label: Web UI URL
collapseChangelog.label: Collapse Changelog
colorBlindMode.description: Use blue instead of green for diff additions
colorBlindMode.label: Color-Blind Mode
commands.enableClaudeProject.label: Claude Project Commands
commands.enableClaudeUser.label: Claude User Commands
commands.enableOpencodeProject.label: OpenCode Project Commands
commands.enableOpencodeUser.label: OpenCode User Commands
compaction.dropUseless.description: Prune tool results flagged contextually useless (no matches, timed-out waits) once consumed (cache-aware)
compaction.dropUseless.label: Elide Uneventful Results
compaction.enabled.description: Automatically compact context when it gets too large
compaction.enabled.label: Auto-Compact
compaction.handoffSaveToDisk.description: Save generated handoff documents to markdown files for the auto-handoff flow
compaction.handoffSaveToDisk.label: Save Handoff Docs
compaction.idleEnabled.description: Compact context while idle when token count exceeds threshold
compaction.idleEnabled.label: Idle Compaction
compaction.idleThresholdTokens.descripti: Token count above which idle compaction triggers
compaction.idleThresholdTokens.label: Idle Compaction Threshold
compaction.idleTimeoutSeconds.descriptio: Seconds to wait while idle before compacting
compaction.idleTimeoutSeconds.label: Idle Compaction Delay
compaction.midTurnEnabled.description: Check thresholds at safe mid-turn tool-loop boundaries before the next provider request
compaction.midTurnEnabled.label: Mid-Turn Compaction
compaction.remoteEnabled.description: Use remote compaction endpoints when available instead of local summarization
compaction.remoteEnabled.label: Remote Compaction
compaction.strategy.description: Choose in-place context-full maintenance, auto-handoff, surgical shake (drop heavy content), snapcompact (archive history as dense images), or disable auto maintenance (off)
compaction.strategy.label: Compaction Strategy
compaction.supersedeReads.description: Prune older read results when the same file is read again (cache-aware, runs every turn)
compaction.supersedeReads.label: Supersede Stale Reads
compaction.thresholdPercent.description: Percent threshold for context maintenance; set to Default to use legacy reserve-based behavior
compaction.thresholdPercent.label: Compaction Threshold
compaction.thresholdTokens.description: Fixed token limit for context maintenance; overrides percentage if set
compaction.thresholdTokens.label: Compaction Token Limit
completion.notify.description: Notify when the agent finishes a turn
completion.notify.label: Completion Notification
contextPromotion.enabled.description: Promote to a larger-context model on context overflow instead of compacting
contextPromotion.enabled.label: Auto-Promote Context
debug.enabled.description: Enable the debug tool for DAP-based debugging
debug.enabled.label: Debug
defaultThinkingLevel.label: Thinking Level
dev.autoqa.description: Enable automated tool issue reporting (report_tool_issue) for all agents
dev.autoqa.label: Auto QA
dev.autoqaPush.endpoint.description: Full URL receiving Auto QA JSON reports (default https://qa.omp.sh/v1/grievances)
dev.autoqaPush.endpoint.label: Auto QA Push Endpoint
display.cacheMissMarker.description: Show a divider above an assistant turn whose request lost (missed) the prompt cache
display.cacheMissMarker.label: Cache Miss Marker
display.shimmer.label: Shimmer
display.showTokenUsage.description: Show per-turn token usage on assistant messages
display.showTokenUsage.label: Show Token Usage
display.smoothStreaming.description: Reveal assistant text and streamed tool input smoothly while chunks arrive
display.smoothStreaming.label: Smooth Streaming
doubleEscapeAction.description: Action when pressing Escape twice with empty editor
doubleEscapeAction.label: Double-Escape Action
edit.blockAutoGenerated.description: Prevent editing of files that appear to be auto-generated (protoc, sqlc, swagger, etc.)
edit.blockAutoGenerated.label: Block Auto-Generated Files
edit.fuzzyMatch.description: Accept high-confidence fuzzy matches for whitespace differences
edit.fuzzyMatch.label: Fuzzy Match
edit.fuzzyThreshold.description: Similarity threshold (0-1) for accepting fuzzy matches
edit.fuzzyThreshold.label: Fuzzy Match Threshold
edit.mode.description: Select the edit tool variant (replace, patch, hashline, or apply_patch)
edit.mode.label: Edit Mode
edit.streamingAbort.description: Abort streaming edit tool calls when patch preview fails
edit.streamingAbort.label: Abort on Failed Preview
emojiAutocomplete.description: Suggest emojis from `:name:` shortcodes and expand text emoticons like `:D` or `:-)`
emojiAutocomplete.label: Emoji Autocomplete
eval.jl.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch Julia cells to the persistent Julia kernel
eval.jl.label: Julia Eval Backend
eval.js.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch JavaScript cells to the in-process runtime
eval.js.label: JavaScript Eval Backend
eval.py.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch Python cells to the IPython kernel
eval.py.label: Python Eval Backend
eval.rb.description: Allow the eval tool to dispatch Ruby cells to the persistent Ruby kernel
eval.rb.label: Ruby Eval Backend
exa.enableResearcher.description: Enable the Exa researcher tool for AI-powered deep research
exa.enableResearcher.label: Exa Researcher
exa.enableSearch.description: Enable Exa basic search, deep search, code search, and crawl tools
exa.enableSearch.label: Exa Search
exa.enableWebsets.description: Enable Exa webset management and enrichment tools
exa.enableWebsets.label: Exa Websets
exa.enabled.description: Master toggle for all Exa search tools
exa.enabled.label: Exa
exa.searchDelayMs.description: Minimum delay between Exa web search requests in milliseconds; set 0 to disable pacing
exa.searchDelayMs.label: Exa Search Delay
fastModeScope.label: Fast Mode Scope
features.unexpectedStopDetection.descrip: Use a small model to detect when the assistant says it will continue but stops without tool calls; automatically prompt it to continue.
features.unexpectedStopDetection.label: Detect unexpected stops
fetch.enabled.description: Allow the read tool to fetch and process URLs
fetch.enabled.label: Read URLs
followUpMode.description: How to drain follow-up messages after a turn completes
followUpMode.label: Follow-Up Mode
git.enabled.description: Show git branch, status, and PR information in the TUI and watch repository metadata.
git.enabled.label: Enable Git Integration
github.cache.enabled.description: Cache rendered issue/PR view output in ~/.omp/cache/github-cache.db so repeated reads are free
github.cache.enabled.label: GitHub View Cache
github.cache.hardTtlSec.description: Past the soft TTL the cached row is returned and refreshed in the background; past the hard TTL it is dropped (seconds; default 7 days)
github.cache.hardTtlSec.label: GitHub Cache Hard TTL
github.cache.softTtlSec.description: Within this window, cached issue/PR view rows are returned directly (seconds; default 5 minutes)
github.cache.softTtlSec.label: GitHub Cache Soft TTL
github.enabled.description: Enable the github tool (op-based dispatch for repository, issue, pull request, diff, search, checkout, push, and Actions watch workflows)
github.enabled.label: GitHub CLI
glob.enabled.description: Enable the glob tool for glob-based file lookup
glob.enabled.label: Glob
goal.continuationModes.description: Run modes where active goals may auto-continue between turns
goal.continuationModes.label: Goal Continuation Modes
goal.enabled.description: Enable per-session goal mode and the hidden goal tool
goal.enabled.label: Goal Mode
goal.statusInFooter.description: Show token budget alongside the goal indicator in the status line
goal.statusInFooter.label: Goal Status in Footer
grep.contextAfter.description: Lines of context after each grep match
grep.contextAfter.label: Grep Context After
grep.contextBefore.description: Lines of context before each grep match
grep.contextBefore.label: Grep Context Before
grep.enabled.description: Enable the grep tool for regex content search
grep.enabled.label: Grep
hideThinkingBlock.description: Hide thinking blocks in assistant responses
hideThinkingBlock.label: Hide Thinking Blocks
hindsight.apiUrl.label: Hindsight API URL
hindsight.autoRecall.description: Recall memories on the first turn of each session
hindsight.autoRecall.label: Hindsight Auto Recall
hindsight.autoRetain.description: Retain transcript every N turns and at session boundaries
hindsight.autoRetain.label: Hindsight Auto Retain
hindsight.bankId.label: Hindsight Bank ID
hindsight.mentalModelAutoSeed.descriptio: At session start, create any built-in mental models (project-conventions, project-decisions, user-preferences) that do not yet exist on the bank.
hindsight.mentalModelAutoSeed.label: Hindsight Mental Model Auto-Seed
hindsight.mentalModelsEnabled.descriptio: Read curated reflect summaries (mental models) into developer instructions at boot. Loads existing models on the bank — does not write. Pair with hindsight.mentalModelAutoSeed to also auto-create the built-in seed set.
hindsight.mentalModelsEnabled.label: Hindsight Mental Models
hindsight.retainMode.description: full-session = upsert one document per session, last-turn = chunked
hindsight.retainMode.label: Hindsight Retain Mode
hindsight.scoping.description: global = one shared bank; per-project = isolated bank per cwd; per-project-tagged = shared bank with project tags so global + project memories merge on recall
hindsight.scoping.label: Hindsight Scoping
i18n.language.label: Language
images.autoResize.description: Resize large images to 2000x2000 max for better model compatibility
images.autoResize.label: Auto-Resize Images
images.blockImages.description: Prevent images from being sent to LLM providers
images.blockImages.label: Block Images
images.describeForTextModels.description: When an image is attached to a model without vision support, save it under local:// and inject a description from a vision-capable model instead of dropping it
images.describeForTextModels.label: Describe Images for Text Models
includeModelInPrompt.description: Surface the active model identifier in the system prompt so the agent knows which model it is
includeModelInPrompt.label: Include Model in Prompt
includeWorkspaceTree.description: Render the workspace directory tree in the system prompt. WARNING: This can bust prompt caching across sessions when files are modified.
includeWorkspaceTree.label: Include Workspace Tree
inlineToolDescriptors.description: Render full tool descriptors in the system prompt and strip top-level/nested descriptions from provider tool schemas so descriptor text is sent once. Auto enables this for Gemini models and disables it otherwise
inlineToolDescriptors.label: Inline Tool Descriptors
inspect_image.enabled.description: Enable the inspect_image tool, delegating image understanding to a vision-capable model
inspect_image.enabled.label: Inspect Image
interruptMode.description: When steering messages interrupt tool execution
interruptMode.label: Interrupt Mode
irc.timeoutMs.description: Default timeout for irc wait (and send await:true) in milliseconds; 0 disables the timeout
irc.timeoutMs.label: IRC Timeout
julia.interpreter.description: Optional path to an exact Julia executable. When set, automatic Julia runtime discovery is skipped.
julia.interpreter.label: Julia Interpreter
loop.mode.description: What happens between /loop iterations before re-submitting the prompt
loop.mode.label: Loop Mode
lsp.diagnosticsDeduplicate.description: Suppress post-edit LSP diagnostics already shown for a file; only surface new or changed ones
lsp.diagnosticsDeduplicate.label: Deduplicate Diagnostics
lsp.diagnosticsOnEdit.description: Return LSP diagnostics after editing code files
lsp.diagnosticsOnEdit.label: Diagnostics on Edit
lsp.diagnosticsOnWrite.description: Return LSP diagnostics after writing code files
lsp.diagnosticsOnWrite.label: Diagnostics on Write
lsp.enabled.description: Enable the lsp tool for code intelligence (definitions, references, diagnostics, rename)
lsp.enabled.label: LSP
lsp.formatOnWrite.description: Automatically format code files using LSP after writing
lsp.formatOnWrite.label: Format on Write
lsp.lazy.description: Start language servers on first use (lsp tool or editing a matching file type) instead of at session startup
lsp.lazy.label: Lazy LSP Startup
magicKeywords.enabled.description: Enable hidden notices for standalone ultrathink, orchestrate, and workflowz keywords
magicKeywords.enabled.label: Magic Keywords
magicKeywords.orchestrate.description: Let standalone orchestrate append its hidden multi-agent orchestration notice
magicKeywords.orchestrate.label: Orchestrate Keyword
magicKeywords.ultrathink.description: Let standalone ultrathink request maximum automatic thinking and append its hidden notice
magicKeywords.ultrathink.label: Ultrathink Keyword
magicKeywords.workflow.description: Let standalone workflowz append its hidden eval workflow notice
magicKeywords.workflow.label: Workflow Keyword
marketplace.autoUpdate.description: Check for plugin updates on startup
marketplace.autoUpdate.label: Marketplace Auto-Update
mcp.discoveryDefaultServers.description: Keep MCP tools from these servers visible while discovery mode hides other MCP tools
mcp.discoveryDefaultServers.label: MCP Discovery Default Servers
mcp.discoveryMode.description: Hide MCP tools by default and expose them through a tool discovery tool
mcp.discoveryMode.label: MCP Tool Discovery
mcp.enableProjectConfig.label: MCP Project Config
mcp.notificationDebounceMs.description: Debounce window in milliseconds for MCP resource updates before injecting them into the conversation
mcp.notificationDebounceMs.label: MCP Notification Debounce
mcp.notifications.description: Inject MCP resource updates into the agent conversation
mcp.notifications.label: MCP Update Injection
memory.backend.description: Off, local summary pipeline, Mnemopi SQLite, or Hindsight remote memory
memory.backend.label: Memory Backend
minP.label: Min P
mnemopi.autoRecall.description: Recall local memories into the first turn of each session
mnemopi.autoRecall.label: Mnemopi Auto Recall
mnemopi.autoRetain.description: Retain completed conversation turns into local Mnemopi memory
mnemopi.autoRetain.label: Mnemopi Auto Retain
mnemopi.bank.description: Optional shared bank base name. Per-project modes derive project-local banks from it.
mnemopi.bank.label: Mnemopi Bank
mnemopi.dbPath.description: Optional SQLite DB path. Defaults to the agent memories directory.
mnemopi.dbPath.label: Mnemopi DB Path
mnemopi.embeddingApiKey.description: Optional embedding API key passed to Mnemopi
mnemopi.embeddingApiKey.label: Mnemopi Embedding API Key
mnemopi.embeddingApiUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoint passed to Mnemopi
mnemopi.embeddingApiUrl.label: Mnemopi Embedding API URL
mnemopi.embeddingModel.description: Advanced: explicit embedding model id that overrides the variant. Leave empty to use mnemopi.embeddingVariant.
mnemopi.embeddingModel.label: Mnemopi Embedding Model
mnemopi.embeddingVariant.description: Local embedding model family. en = stronger English model; multilingual = cross-language model. Changing this rebuilds existing memory embeddings on next start.
mnemopi.embeddingVariant.label: Embedding variant
mnemopi.enhancedRecall.description: Enable the tiered query result cache for repeated and similar recall queries
mnemopi.enhancedRecall.label: Mnemopi Enhanced Recall
mnemopi.llmApiKey.description: Optional LLM API key for Mnemopi remote mode
mnemopi.llmApiKey.label: Mnemopi LLM API Key
mnemopi.llmBaseUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint for Mnemopi remote mode
mnemopi.llmBaseUrl.label: Mnemopi LLM Base URL
mnemopi.llmMode.description: Use no LLM, the online tiny model (the TINY role from /models, else pi/smol), or a remote OpenAI-compatible endpoint
mnemopi.llmMode.label: Mnemopi LLM Mode
mnemopi.llmModel.description: Optional LLM model name for Mnemopi remote mode
mnemopi.llmModel.label: Mnemopi LLM Model
mnemopi.noEmbeddings.description: Force deterministic FTS-only recall instead of vector embeddings
mnemopi.noEmbeddings.label: Mnemopi Disable Embeddings
mnemopi.polyphonicRecall.description: Enable 4-voice recall (vector, graph, fact, temporal) fused with reciprocal rank fusion
mnemopi.polyphonicRecall.label: Mnemopi Polyphonic Recall
mnemopi.proactiveLinking.description: Ingest new memories into the episodic graph as they are stored, linking them to related entities and memories
mnemopi.proactiveLinking.label: Mnemopi Proactive Linking
mnemopi.scoping.description: global = one shared bank; per-project = isolated bank per cwd; per-project-tagged = project-local writes plus global recall visibility
mnemopi.scoping.label: Mnemopi Scoping
model.loopGuard.checkAssistantContent.de: Apply loop guard to assistant prose messages in addition to thinking logs
model.loopGuard.enabled.description: Enable automatic stream loop detection for Gemini and DeepSeek models
model.loopGuard.enabled.label: Loop Guard
model.loopGuard.toolCallReminder.descrip: When a Gemini reasoning stream emits many consecutive planning headers without calling a tool, interrupt it and inject a reminder to issue a tool call (requires Loop Guard)
model.loopGuard.toolCallReminder.label: Loop Guard Tool-Call Reminder
omitThinking.description: Instruct upstream providers to completely omit thinking summaries from responses (where supported)
omitThinking.label: Omit Thinking summaries
paste.largeMenuThreshold.description: When a paste reaches this many lines, offer a menu to wrap it in a code block, wrap it in XML tags, or save it to a file. 0 disables the menu (large pastes still collapse to a [Paste] marker).
paste.largeMenuThreshold.label: Large Paste Menu
personality.description: Communication style rendered into the system prompt's personality block
personality.label: Personality
plan.defaultOnStartup.description: Automatically enter plan mode at the start of every new session
plan.defaultOnStartup.label: Start in Plan Mode
plan.enabled.description: Enable plan mode for read-only exploration and planning before execution
plan.enabled.label: Plan Mode
power.sleepPrevention.description: Prevent macOS sleep during active sessions. Each level is cumulative — it adds the flags of all lower levels.
power.sleepPrevention.label: Sleep Prevention
presencePenalty.description: Penalty for introducing already-present tokens (-1 = provider default)
presencePenalty.label: Presence Penalty
proseOnlyThinking.description: Omit code blocks from thinking summaries and replace them with an ellipsis
proseOnlyThinking.label: Prose Only Thinking
provider.appendOnlyContext.description: Cache system prompt + tool specs and keep an append-only message log so provider prefix caches (DeepSeek, Xiaomi/SGLang, Anthropic) hit at maximum rate. Auto enables for known prefix-cache providers.
provider.appendOnlyContext.label: Append-Only Context
providers.antigravityEndpoint.descriptio: Endpoint routing strategy for google-antigravity providers (chat, search, image, discovery)
providers.antigravityEndpoint.label: Antigravity Endpoint Mode
providers.autoThinkingModel.description: Difficulty classifier for the `auto` thinking level: online (the TINY role from /models, else smol) by default, or a local on-device model
providers.autoThinkingModel.label: Auto Thinking Model
providers.fetch.description: Reader backend priority for the fetch/read URL tool
providers.fetch.label: Fetch Provider
providers.fireworksTier.label: Fireworks Tier
providers.image.label: Image Provider
providers.kimiApiFormat.description: API format for Kimi Code provider
providers.kimiApiFormat.label: Kimi API Format
providers.maxInFlightRequests.label: Max In-Flight Requests
providers.memoryModel.description: Mnemopi LLM for fact extraction + consolidation: online (the TINY role from /models, else smol/remote) by default, or a local on-device model
providers.memoryModel.label: Memory Model
providers.openaiWebsockets.description: Websocket policy for OpenAI Codex models (auto uses model defaults, on forces, off disables)
providers.openaiWebsockets.label: OpenAI WebSockets
providers.openrouterVariant.description: Default routing-variant suffix appended to OpenRouter model IDs (overridden when the selector already names a variant)
providers.openrouterVariant.label: OpenRouter Routing
providers.tinyModel.description: Session-title model: online (the TINY role from /models, else pi/smol) by default, or a local on-device model
providers.tinyModel.label: Tiny Model
providers.tinyModelDevice.description: ONNX execution provider for local tiny models (titles + memory). Default uses CPU-only inference. The PI_TINY_DEVICE env var overrides this.
providers.tinyModelDevice.label: Tiny Model Device
providers.tinyModelDtype.description: ONNX quantization/precision for local tiny models. Default uses each model's shipped dtype (q4); lower precision is faster, higher is more faithful. The PI_TINY_DTYPE env var overrides this.
providers.tinyModelDtype.label: Tiny Model Precision
providers.tts.description: Backend for the tts tool: local on-device neural TTS (Kokoro-82M) or xAI Grok Voice
providers.tts.label: Text-to-Speech Provider
providers.unexpectedStopModel.descriptio: Classifier for unexpected-stop detection: online (the TINY role from /models, else smol) by default, or a local on-device model.
providers.unexpectedStopModel.label: Unexpected Stop Model
providers.webSearch.description: Preferred provider for the web_search tool
providers.webSearch.label: Web Search Provider
providers.webSearchExclude.description: Providers that web_search should never use, even as fallbacks
providers.webSearchExclude.label: Excluded Web Search Providers
python.interpreter.description: Optional path to an exact Python executable. When set, automatic Python runtime discovery is skipped.
python.interpreter.label: Python Interpreter
python.kernelMode.description: Keep the IPython kernel alive across eval calls or start fresh each time
python.kernelMode.label: Python Kernel Mode
read.defaultLimit.description: Default number of lines returned when agent calls read without a limit
read.defaultLimit.label: Default Read Limit
read.summarize.enabled.description: Return structural code summaries when read is called without an explicit selector
read.summarize.enabled.label: Read Summaries
read.summarize.minBodyLines.description: Minimum multiline body or literal length before read summaries collapse it
read.summarize.minBodyLines.label: Read Summary Body Lines
read.summarize.minCommentLines.descripti: Minimum multiline block comment length before read summaries collapse it
read.summarize.minCommentLines.label: Read Summary Comment Lines
read.summarize.minTotalLines.description: Files with fewer total lines are read verbatim instead of structurally summarized
read.summarize.minTotalLines.label: Read Summary Minimum File Length
read.summarize.prose.description: Return structural summaries for Markdown and plain text reads
read.summarize.prose.label: Prose Summaries
read.summarize.unfoldLimit.description: Hard ceiling on summary size while BFS-unfolding. An unfold whose revealed lines would exceed this is skipped (that span stays folded) and unfolding continues with the remaining spans.
read.summarize.unfoldLimit.label: Read Summary Unfold Ceiling
read.summarize.unfoldUntil.description: BFS-unfold elidable spans until the summary is at least this many visible lines. 0 keeps only the outermost elisions.
read.summarize.unfoldUntil.label: Read Summary Unfold Target
read.toolResultPreview.description: Render read tool results inline in the transcript instead of summary rows
read.toolResultPreview.label: Inline Read Previews
readLineNumbers.description: Prepend line numbers to read tool output by default
readLineNumbers.label: Line Numbers
repetitionPenalty.description: Penalty for repeated tokens (-1 = provider default)
repetitionPenalty.label: Repetition Penalty
retry.fallbackRevertPolicy.description: When to return to the primary model after a fallback
retry.fallbackRevertPolicy.label: Fallback Revert Policy
retry.maxDelayMs.description: Maximum wait between retries, in ms. When the provider asks us to wait longer than this and no credential or model fallback succeeds, the request fails fast instead of sleeping (e.g. 3-hour Anthropic rate-limit windows).
retry.maxDelayMs.label: Max Retry Delay
retry.maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts on API errors
retry.maxRetries.label: Retry Attempts
retry.modelFallback.description: Allow retry recovery to switch to configured fallback models
retry.modelFallback.label: Retry Model Fallback
ruby.interpreter.description: Optional path to an exact Ruby executable. When set, automatic Ruby runtime discovery is skipped.
ruby.interpreter.label: Ruby Interpreter
searxng.endpoint.description: Base URL of a self-hosted SearXNG instance used for web search
searxng.endpoint.label: SearXNG Endpoint
secrets.enabled.description: Obfuscate secrets before sending to AI providers
secrets.enabled.label: Hide Secrets
serviceTier.label: Service Tier
serviceTierAdvisor.description: Service Tier for the advisor model. None = standard processing; Inherit = match the main agent's live tier; pick a value (e.g. Priority) to run the advisor on a faster serving path.
serviceTierAdvisor.label: Service Tier - Advisor
serviceTierSubagent.description: Service Tier for spawned task/eval subagents. Inherit = match the main agent's live tier (tracks /fast); pick a value to scope subagents independently.
serviceTierSubagent.label: Service Tier - Subagent
share.redactSecrets.description: Run the secret obfuscator over /share snapshots before upload (uses the secrets.* config)
share.redactSecrets.label: Share Secret Redaction
share.serverUrl.description: Share viewer/upload base used by /share (encrypted blob upload + viewer; links are <base>/<id>#<key>)
share.serverUrl.label: Share Server
share.store.description: Where /share uploads the encrypted session blob
share.store.label: Share Store
shellMinimizer.enabled.description: Compress verbose shell output (git, npm, cargo, etc.) before returning it to the agent
shellMinimizer.enabled.label: Shell Minimizer
shellMinimizer.sourceOutlineLevel.descri: Source outline mode for cat/read of source files: default or aggressive
shellMinimizer.sourceOutlineLevel.label: Shell Minimizer Source Outline
showHardwareCursor.description: Show terminal cursor for IME support
showHardwareCursor.label: Show Hardware Cursor
skills.enableSkillCommands.label: Skill Commands
snapcompact.shape.description: Frame shape snapcompact prints text with (compaction archive and inline imaging). Auto picks a shape tuned for the current model.
snapcompact.shape.label: Snapcompact Shape
snapcompact.systemPrompt.description: Experimental: render selected system prompt text as dense PNG image(s) and attach to the first user message (vision models only). Saves tokens; loses prompt caching for imaged text.
snapcompact.systemPrompt.label: Snapcompact System Prompt
snapcompact.toolResults.description: Experimental: render large historical tool results as dense PNG image(s) instead of text (vision models only). Saves tokens on accumulated read/search output.
snapcompact.toolResults.label: Snapcompact Tool Results
speech.enabled.description: Speak the assistant's output aloud through the speakers as it streams
speech.enabled.label: Speech Vocalization
speech.mode.description: What to speak: all = assistant messages + thinking; assistant = messages only; yield = only the final message at turn end
speech.mode.label: Speech Vocalization Mode
speech.voice.description: Kokoro voice used when speaking the assistant's output aloud
speech.voice.label: Speech Vocalization Voice
speechgen.enabled.description: Enable the tts tool for on-device (Kokoro) or xAI Grok Voice speech-file synthesis
speechgen.enabled.label: Speech Generation
startup.checkUpdate.description: Check for omp updates on startup
startup.checkUpdate.label: Check for Updates
startup.quiet.description: Skip welcome screen and startup status messages
startup.quiet.label: Quiet Startup
startup.setupWizard.description: Show newly added onboarding steps once per setup version
startup.setupWizard.label: Setup Wizard
startup.showSplash.description: Show the full animated setup splash on normal interactive startup without rerunning setup. Quiet Startup still suppresses it.
startup.showSplash.label: Show Startup Splash
statusLine.preset.label: Status Line Preset
statusLine.separator.label: Status Line Separator
statusLine.sessionAccent.description: Use the session name color for the editor border and status line gap
statusLine.sessionAccent.label: Session Accent
statusLine.showHookStatus.description: Display hook status messages below the status line
statusLine.showHookStatus.label: Show Hook Status
statusLine.transparent.description: Use the terminal's default background for the status line instead of the theme's `statusLineBg`. Powerline end caps are dropped because they need a contrasting fill to bridge into the surrounding terminal.
statusLine.transparent.label: Transparent Status Line
steeringMode.description: How to process queued messages while agent is working
steeringMode.label: Steering Mode
stt.enabled.label: Speech-to-Text
stt.modelName.description: Local on-device speech model. Parakeet TDT v3 (sherpa-onnx) is the SoTA default; Whisper base/small/large-v3-turbo tiers (transformers.js) trade size for multilingual coverage. Downloaded on first use.
stt.modelName.label: Speech Model
symbolPreset.description: Glyph set for icons and symbols (Unicode, Nerd Font, or ASCII)
symbolPreset.label: Symbol Preset
tabs.appearance.label: Appearance
tabs.context.label: Context
tabs.files.label: Files
tabs.interaction.label: Interaction
tabs.memory.label: Memory
tabs.model.label: Model
tabs.providers.label: Providers
tabs.shell.label: Shell
tabs.tasks.label: Tasks
tabs.tools.label: Tools
task.agentIdleTtlMs.description: How long an idle subagent stays live in memory before being parked to disk (ms). Parked agents are revived automatically when messaged or resumed. 0 keeps idle agents live until exit.
task.agentIdleTtlMs.label: Agent Idle TTL
task.batch.label: Batch Task Calls
task.eager.description: How strongly to push delegating work to subagents
task.eager.label: Prefer Task Delegation
task.enableLsp.description: Allow subagents spawned via the task tool to use the lsp tool. Off by default to keep subagents cheap; enable when LSP-aware delegation is worth the extra tokens.
task.enableLsp.label: LSP in Subagents
task.isolation.commits.description: Commit message style for nested repo changes (generic or AI-generated)
task.isolation.commits.label: Isolation Commit Style
task.isolation.merge.description: How isolated task changes are integrated (patch apply or branch merge)
task.isolation.merge.label: Isolation Merge Strategy
task.isolation.mode.label: Isolation Mode
task.maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of subagents running concurrently
task.maxConcurrency.label: Max Concurrent Tasks
task.maxRecursionDepth.description: How many levels deep subagents can spawn their own subagents
task.maxRecursionDepth.label: Max Task Recursion
task.maxRuntimeMs.description: Hard wall-clock limit per subagent (ms). 0 disables it. Defense-in-depth against provider-side stream hangs that escape the inference-layer watchdog; triggers a normal subagent abort with a 'timed out' reason.
task.maxRuntimeMs.label: Max Subagent Runtime
task.showResolvedModelBadge.description: Display the actual model ID used by each subagent in the task widget status line
task.showResolvedModelBadge.label: Show Resolved Model Badge
task.softRequestBudget.description: Soft per-subagent request budget (assistant requests per run). Crossing it injects one steering notice asking the subagent to wrap up; at 1.5x the budget the run is aborted gracefully, salvaging partial output. 0 disables the guard. Bundled explore/quick_task agents use a lower built-in budget.
task.softRequestBudget.label: Soft Subagent Request Budget
tasks.todoClearDelay.description: Delay before completed or abandoned todos are removed from the todo widget
tasks.todoClearDelay.label: Todo Auto-Clear Delay
temperature.description: Sampling temperature (0 = deterministic, 1 = creative, -1 = provider default)
temperature.label: Temperature
terminal.showImages.description: Render images inline in the terminal
terminal.showImages.label: Show Inline Images
terminal.showProgress.description: Emit OSC 9;4 indeterminate progress while the agent or context maintenance is running
terminal.showProgress.label: Native Terminal Progress
textVerbosity.description: OpenAI Responses and Codex response verbosity (low, medium, or high)
textVerbosity.label: Text Verbosity
theme.dark.description: Theme used when the terminal has a dark background
theme.dark.label: Dark Theme
theme.light.description: Theme used when the terminal has a light background
theme.light.label: Light Theme
todo.eager.description: How strongly to push automatic todo-list creation after the first message
todo.eager.label: Create Todos Automatically
todo.enabled.description: Enable the todo tool for task tracking
todo.enabled.label: Todos
todo.reminders.description: Remind the agent to complete todos before stopping
todo.reminders.label: Todo Reminders
todo.reminders.max.description: Maximum number of todo reminders before giving up
todo.reminders.max.label: Todo Reminder Limit
tools.abortOnFabricatedResult.descriptio: With in-band tool calls, stop the model immediately when it starts hallucinating a tool result mid-turn. Disable to let the model finish generating and discard the fabricated continuation instead.
tools.abortOnFabricatedResult.label: Abort On Fabricated Tool Result
tools.approvalMode.description: Default approval behavior for tool calls. 'Always ask' auto-approves read-only tools only. 'Write' auto-approves read and workspace-write tools. 'Yolo' auto-approves all tiers; user policy may still prompt or block.
tools.approvalMode.label: Tool Approval
tools.artifactHeadBytes.description: Amount of head content kept inline alongside the tail when output spills to artifact (middle elision). 0 disables — keep tail only.
tools.artifactHeadBytes.label: Artifact Head Size (KB)
tools.artifactSpillThreshold.description: Tool output above this size is saved as an artifact; tail is kept inline
tools.artifactSpillThreshold.label: Artifact Spill Threshold (KB)
tools.artifactTailBytes.description: Amount of tail content kept inline when output spills to artifact
tools.artifactTailBytes.label: Artifact Tail Size (KB)
tools.artifactTailLines.description: Maximum lines of tail content kept inline when output spills to artifact
tools.artifactTailLines.label: Artifact Tail Lines
tools.discoveryMode.description: Hide tools behind a search tool to save tokens. 'auto' hides MCP tools once the tool set has more than 40 tools; 'mcp-only' always hides MCP tools; 'all' hides all non-essential built-ins too.
tools.discoveryMode.label: Tool Discovery
tools.essentialOverride.description: Override the always-loaded built-in tools (default: read, bash, edit, write, glob, eval). Leave empty to use defaults.
tools.essentialOverride.label: Essential Tools Override
tools.format.description: Controls how tools are exposed to the model. Auto uses provider-native tool calls unless the selected model is marked as not supporting them, then falls back to the GLM owned dialect. Native forces provider-native tools; the other values force the named owned dialect. Applies on session start.
tools.format.label: Tool Calling Mode
tools.intentTracing.description: Ask the agent to describe the intent of each tool call before executing it
tools.intentTracing.label: Intent Tracing
tools.maxTimeout.description: Maximum timeout in seconds the agent can set for any tool (0 = no limit)
tools.maxTimeout.label: Max Tool Timeout
tools.outputMaxColumns.description: Per-line byte cap for streaming tool outputs (bash, ssh, python, js eval) and `read`. Lines wider than this are ellipsis-truncated; remaining bytes up to the next newline are dropped. 0 disables.
tools.outputMaxColumns.label: Output Column Cap
topK.description: Sample from top-K tokens (-1 = provider default)
topK.label: Top K
topP.label: Top P
treeFilterMode.description: Default filter mode when opening the session tree
treeFilterMode.label: Session Tree Filter
tts.localModel.description: On-device neural TTS model (Kokoro-82M) used by the local TTS backend
tts.localModel.label: Local TTS Model
tts.localVoice.description: Kokoro voice used by the local TTS backend (American/British, female/male)
tts.localVoice.label: Local TTS Voice
ttsr.builtinRules.description: Load the default rules shipped with the agent (override individually with ttsr.disabledRules)
ttsr.builtinRules.label: Built-in Rules
ttsr.contextMode.description: What to do with partial output when TTSR triggers
ttsr.contextMode.label: TTSR Context Mode
ttsr.disabledRules.description: Rule names to ignore entirely (applies to bundled defaults and your own rules)
ttsr.disabledRules.label: Disabled Rules
ttsr.enabled.description: Interrupt the agent mid-stream when output matches rule patterns (Time-Traveling Stream Rules)
ttsr.enabled.label: TTSR
ttsr.interruptMode.description: When to interrupt mid-stream vs inject warning after completion
ttsr.interruptMode.label: TTSR Interrupt Mode
ttsr.repeatGap.description: Messages before a rule can trigger again
ttsr.repeatGap.label: TTSR Repeat Gap
ttsr.repeatMode.description: How rules can repeat: once per session or after a message gap
ttsr.repeatMode.label: TTSR Repeat Mode
tui.hyperlinks.description: Wrap paths and URLs in OSC 8 hyperlinks for terminal-native click-to-open (auto: detect support; off: never; always: unconditional)
tui.hyperlinks.label: Terminal Hyperlinks
tui.renderMermaid.description: Render Mermaid fenced code blocks as ASCII diagrams
tui.renderMermaid.label: Render Mermaid Diagrams
tui.textSizing.description: Render Markdown H1 headings at 2x scale using Kitty's OSC 66 text-sizing protocol. Only takes effect on Kitty terminals; ignored everywhere else. Off by default.
tui.textSizing.label: Large Headings (Kitty)
tui.tight.description: Remove the 1-character horizontal padding from the left and right of the terminal output
tui.tight.label: Tight Layout
vault.enabled.description: Enable the vault:// internal URL for reading and editing Obsidian vault content via the Obsidian CLI. When disabled, vault:// resolution is refused and the vault:// entry is omitted from the system prompt.
vault.enabled.label: Obsidian Vault
web_search.enabled.description: Enable the web_search tool for live web results
web_search.enabled.label: Web Search
worktree.base.description: Base directory for agent-managed worktrees — task-isolation copies, `github` PR checkouts, and `omp worktree` cleanup all live here. Unset uses ~/.omp/wt. Must be an absolute or ~-relative path; relative paths are ignored. The OMP_WORKTREE_DIR env var overrides this.
worktree.base.label: Worktree Base Directory
